note: Day 32 (Wednesday). All Batch 1-4 email sequences complete as of 2026-04-24 (fu_049 = final campaign send). IMAP gap: 25 days (last confirmed: 2026-04-04). No Batch 5 Ryedale data received. LinkedIn channel in HOLD — no active outreach today. Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22: final close emails assumed sent 2026-04-25 (Friday). Now Day 4 of 7-day buffer — 3 days remaining, buffer expires 2026-05-02. LinkedIn channel convergence on Monday 2026-05-04: warm pipeline nurture opens + Batch 5 Day 3-5 window opens simultaneously (if sends fire any day this week). This is the most important LinkedIn planning date in the campaign.

linkedin_post_close_option.rule: If leads 1/3/22 received final close 2026-04-25 and do not reply within 7 days: LinkedIn nurture is permissible as a soft last attempt. Do NOT reference the email outreach or any prior contact.
linkedin_post_close_option.pre_generated_notes: All three notes pre-generated in linkedin_connection_notes.json warm_pipeline_nurture_notes. Char-counted. Ready.
linkedin_post_close_option.caveat: If any of these three leads reply to the email at any point — even to decline — LinkedIn is permanently closed for that lead. IMAP check required before sending any LinkedIn note.
linkedin_post_close_option.imap_gap_risk: 25-day IMAP gap means a silent reply is plausible. HANDS: sweep IMAP immediately and write any replies to new_replies.json before assuming these leads are still silent.

triggers: Warm pipeline buffer expires 2026-05-02 (Saturday) → LinkedIn for leads 1/3/22 available from Monday
If Batch 5 data arrives any day Wed 2026-04-29 to Fri 2026-05-01: Day 3 falls on weekend → held to Monday 2026-05-04
Best-case scenario: single LinkedIn session on Monday covers both warm pipeline AND Batch 5 initial connections
preparation_required: IMAP sweep before Monday session — confirm no replies from warm pipeline leads 1/3/22
Confirm final close emails for leads 1/3/22 were sent 2026-04-25 — log in CHANGELOG.md
Pre-check LinkedIn profiles for leads 1/3/22 (ideally Sunday evening if possible, else Monday morning before session)
If Batch 5 data received this week: have search queries ready for Day 3-6 window leads
Write linkedin_profiles.json immediately after Monday session — even if no note was sent
session_order_monday: 1. IMAP sweep first — cancels any warm pipeline LinkedIn if reply found
2. Batch 5 Day 3-5 connections (if applicable) — highest urgency, narrow window
3. Warm pipeline nurture (leads 1/3/22) — buffer has expired, treat as new cold connection

batch_1_4_summary.root_cause: HANDS execution latency — LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) missed on every batch of candidates across all 32 campaign days
batch_1_4_summary.channel_verdict: Architecturally ready. Operationally unexecuted. BRAIN intelligence layer functioned correctly; HANDS execution layer did not execute on any of 12 consecutive runs.

batch_5_revised_protocol.mandatory_same_session_rule: HANDS must search, check posts, and send note in ONE SESSION on Day 3, 4, 5, or 6. Do not split across days.
batch_5_revised_protocol.brain_flagging: BRAIN marks Day 3 LinkedIn send day with MANDATORY flag in daily_signals.json with a 2-hour execution target.
batch_5_revised_protocol.profiles_json_requirement: HANDS must write linkedin_profiles.json immediately after each search session — whether or not a note was sent.
batch_5_revised_protocol.target_turnaround: Within 2 hours of BRAIN run on Day 3-6. Maximum: same calendar day.
batch_5_revised_protocol.fallback_escalation: If HANDS cannot execute within the window: log in CHANGELOG.md with reason. Do not skip silently.
batch_5_revised_protocol.weekend_rule: LinkedIn Day 3-6 window falling on a weekend: hold to Monday. Exception: if Day 6 is Sunday and Day 7 fires Monday — send Sunday 18:00+.

summary.batch_5_urgency: CRITICAL — 32 days since last initial send (2026-03-28). If data arrives today: BRAIN writes copy immediately. First new sends Wednesday afternoon 2026-04-29. LinkedIn window opens Monday 2026-05-04.
hands_priority_order_today_wednesday: 1. IMAP SWEEP — 25-day gap. Do FIRST before any other action. Check ALL leads. Write results to new_replies.json immediately. If any warm pipeline lead (1/3/22) has replied: cancel their LinkedIn option.
2. Batch 5 Ryedale data — if in hand: return immediately. BRAIN writes copy today. LinkedIn window opens Monday 2026-05-04.
3. Confirm final close emails for leads 1/3/22 sent 2026-04-25. If NOT sent: send today. Log in CHANGELOG.md with timestamp.
4. Confirm fu_046-049 send status in CHANGELOG.md.
5. Send any of fu_036-045 not yet sent — TODAY is the last acceptable day for these breakup emails (Day 19-20).
6. Blocked leads: Companies House (49 — 35 days overdue), phone call (51), Rightmove/Zoopla (53), info@ (54).
7. PLAN Monday 2026-05-04 LinkedIn session: warm pipeline nurture (1/3/22) + Batch 5 Day 3-5 (if sends fire this week).
8. Write linkedin_profiles.json for any LinkedIn searches done in past 12 BRAIN runs — retrospectively.
